description: In this episode of the Binance Podcast, host Wee Jo interviews Veronica Wong, CEO and founder of SafePal, discussing her journey from Tencent to creating a user-friendly hardware wallet. They explore the evolution of blockchain technology and its impact on various industries, emphasizing the importance of secure wallet solutions for managing digital assets.
topic_summary: Wee Jo talks with Veronica Wong about her background in tech, her experience at Tencent, and the development of SafePal's hardware wallet, highlighting the significance of wallets in the blockchain ecosystem [t=0:00 - t=3:00].
